productDisplayName: Jungle Book Boys Safari White T-shirt
description: Style Note Let your little man enjoy comfort and style with this t-shirt from the jungle book collection. This tee is sure to become a favourite in no time and is a must buy. Team it with shorts and comfy footwear for that uber cool and comfy look. Product Details White t-shirt that has a round neck, short red sleeves, graphic and rubber print on the front, stitch detailing and brand badge on the left hem Material and Care 100% Cotton Hand wash warm with like colours using a mild detergent Use a non chlorine bleach if needed Line dry Cool iron; do not iron on decorations Do not dry clean
